verses.text: Topa phat un. Topa' tungah lungdam ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi
Topa' nasepna lianpite kua in genkhia thei ding a, kua in a kicingin amah phat thei ding ahi hiam
Thutang a zui, a tawntungin thumanin a gamta mite, mi nuamsa ahi hi

Topa aw, nangma teel mite' daupaina ka muh theihna ding, nangma minamte' kipakna sungah ka lungkim theihna ding, nangma luahte tawh ka minthan' khawm theihna dingin na mite tungah maipha na lah ciangin kei hong phawk in la, amaute na hotkhiat ciangin kei zong hong huh in
Ka pu ka pate uha kipan kote ka khial khin uh hi. Mawhna ka bawl khin uh a, ka gilo gamtat khin uh hi
Ka pu ka pate un Egypt gamah a om lai-un nangma nasepna a lamdangte ngaihsunlo uh hi. Na itna kip a tampite phawklo uh a, San Tuipi-ah Sangpenpa hong lehdo uh hi
Ahi zongin amah in a lian mahmah a vangliatna a kitheihsakna dingin ama min a ngaihsutna-in amaute a honkhia hi
Amah in San Tuipi thuhilh a, tua tuipi a kang hi. Amah in gamlak kantan bangin tuithuk kantanin amaute a paipih hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in galte' khutsung panin amaute honkhia a, langpangte' vangliatna panin amaute a khahkhia hi
Tui in amau' langte tuummang khin a, amaute a suakta khat zong omlo uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in ama thu um uh a, amah phatna la a sa uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in ama nasepte mangngilh pah uh a, ama thugen ding ngakloin a gamta pah uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in gamlakah duhluat mahmahna nei uh a, sehnel gamsungah Pasian a ze-et uh hi
Amah in amaute' nget pen pia a, ahih hangin amaute lakah natsia a tungsak hi
Gamlakah Moses leh Topa' mi siangtho Aaron a hazat uh ciangin
lei kihongin Dathan valhtum a, Abiram' pawlte a vukcip hi
Amaute' sungah mei hong piangkhia a, meikuang in migilote a kangtum hi
Amaute in Horeb gamsungah bawngno khat bawl uh a, a kisung tua milim a bia uh hi
Amaute in Pasian' minthan'na pen lopa a ne bawngtal lim tawh a khek uh hi
Amaute in Egypt gamsungah na lianpite a bawl, Ham' gamsungah na lamdangte leh San Tuipi-ah a kihtakhuai nate a bawl, amau' Honpa, Pasian mangngilh uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute a suksiatna ding a hehna panin a heikhia dingin Pasian' mai-ah ama teelpa Moses ding hi kei leh amaute ka susia ding hi, amah in ci hi
Amaute in gam nuam simmawh uh a, ama thuciamna umlo uh hi
Amaute a puanbuk sung uhah phun niloh uh a, Topa' thu ngailo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut laamto-in gamsungah amaute puksak a, leitung gam khempeuh minamte' lakah amau' suanlekhakte a thehthang ding a kiciam hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Peor-a Baal pasian bel uh a, nuntakna a neilote tungah biakna-in a kipia sate a ne uh hi
Amau' gamtatna tawh Topa' hehna ding piangsak uh a, amaute' lakah pulnatna hong tung hi
Tua ciangin Finehas dingin hong palai a, pulnatna a hong dai hi
Tua thu pen a khang a khangin ama thumanna-in kiciamteh tawntung hi
Amaute in Meribah tuiphualah amah sinso sakin, amah a langpang uh hi. Thakhatin kamguh a paukha Moses in amaute' huhau-in siatna a ngahlawh hi
Topa in amaute a thupiak bangin amaute in tua mite thatlo uh hi
Minam dangte tawh kihelin amau' gamtat bangbang a gamta dingin a kisin uh hi
Amau-a' dingin thangzak ahi amau' milimte a biakpih uh hi
Amaute in a tapate uh leh a tanute uh dawi biakna-in a nei uh hi
Amaute in Kanaan gam milimte a biakna-un mawhna neilo a tanute uh leh a tapate uh that uh a, hih mi thahna hangin gamsung a nin a suak hi
Tua ahih ciangin amau' sepna tawh amaute a nin suak uh a, amau' gamtatnate tawh palhngulhna a bawl uh hi
Tua ciangin ama mite tungah Topa' hehna hong kitawhkuang a, amah in ama luah minamte a kih hi
Amau a mudah minamte in amaute a uk theihna dingin tua minamte' khutsungah amaute a pia hi
A galte un amaute nengniam uh a, amau' khutnuai-ah amaute a koih uh hi
Amah in amaute tam veipi honkhia hi. Ahih hangin amaute in lehdona lungsim vom uh a, amau' mawhna hangin amaute a kiniamkoih hi
Tua bang ahi ta zongin amaute' kikona a zak ciangin amaute' cihmawhna a don hi
Amaute-a' ding a ngaihsutna-in ama thuciamna phawk a, ama itna kip tawh kizui-in a kolsak hi
Amaute a man mi khempeuhte in a khasiatpih zah dong dingin amah in amau' tungah a piangsak hi
Topa, kote' Pasian aw, kote hong hon in la, nangma min siangtho kong phat theihna ding uh leh nangma tungah lungdamna kong koh theihna dingun minam dangte' lak panin kote hong kaikhawmkik in
Topa, Israel Pasian in a tawntung-a kipan a tawntung dongin thupha ngah ta hen. Mi khempeuh in, “Amen,” ci ta uh hen. Topa phat un.
